reviews.author: Arikka Von
reviews.text: Landon and his team did a phenomenal job on my new roof. Landon was clear about the options and provided regular updates. The crew moved so fast and with expertise. They addressed rot and slumps on the roof that were keeping me up at night. It’s such a relief to have a new roof. Thanks, Landon!

reviews.author: LeeAndra Jones
reviews.text: Great business to work with. Got the job done in one day! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Coach Sis
reviews.text: Landon was top notch.  He made everything easy and checked in with me along the way for a total roof replacement I needed done.  I cant say enough about the job they did for my moms house.  She needed a new roof badly.  Thank you for being a honest and fair roofing contractor who lived up to every inch of what was promised.

reviews.author: Arianne Kaspar
reviews.text: Landon was amazing! Most of the roofers I called told me they had no idea why my roof was leaking, that I should just replace my roof, and then give me an exorbitant price. Landon was the first one to sound knowledgeable about roofs and how to fix leaks. He is also very reasonable in the prices that he charges. I will definitely go back to him again.

reviews.author: Timothy Kaspar
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough good things about Landon and his roofing company. I have had a persistent roof leak for several years that was extremely difficult to locate. I had two other roofing companies look at it previously and neither could find the source. Both simply recommended replacing the entire roof, which would have been very expensive and did not sit right with me.

Landon offered to take a look and approached the problem completely differently. He sent a crew out to carefully patch all of the most likely problem areas instead of pushing a full replacement. Even more impressive, Landon later came by personally to inspect the work and make sure everything had been done correctly.

He took the time to walk me through what he found, explained the reasoning behind the repairs, and answered my questions patiently and clearly. Throughout the entire process he was kind, professional, and genuinely focused on solving the problem the right way.

This was excellent value, honest work, and outstanding service. It is rare to find someone who combines skill, integrity, and personal care like this. I would absolutely recommend Landon to anyone needing roofing work and would not hesitate to use him again.
